arts.ttl: Why Aston Villa vs Brighton is not on TV explained as Chelsea also snubbed
arts.sum: Monday's game will not be shown live in the UK with Manchester United's clash at home to Newcastle selected for Sky Sports coverage instead. Below are all the details on how to follow Monday's game and why it has not been selected for television coverage in the UK...

arts.ttl: Aston Villa team news vs Brighton confirmed as Unai Emery makes three changes
arts.sum: Villa starting XI: Martinez, Konsa, Carlos, Pau, Digne, Kamara, Tielemans, Bailey, McGinn, Rogers, Watkins. arts.ttl: Brighton and West Ham interested in move for defender – Club prefer sale to PL clubs
arts.sum: West Ham United have been linked with a move for AC Milan’s Fikayo Tomori in recent weeks and Brighton & Hove Albion are now interested in the defender. arts.ttl: Brighton in contact with club as players put up for sale – Player already ‘flattered’ by interest
arts.sum: Brighton and Hove Albion are eyeing a move for Lyon midfielder Corentin Tolisso, but it may prove difficult to get over the line. That’s according to L’Equipe, who report that Brighton have inquired about the feasibility of a move in the January transfer window. arts.ttl: Ipswich vs Chelsea - Premier League: Live plus updates from Aston Villa vs Brighton
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as Chelsea travel to Portman road to take on Ipswich Town and Aston Villa host Brighton in Premier League action.

arts.ttl: Brighton enquire about Lyon’s Corentin Tolisso
arts.sum: Brighton and Hove Albion have enquired about a move for Olympique Lyonnais midfielder Corentin Tolisso (30), according to a report from L’Équipe. Lyon are prohibited from recruiting in January and in…

arts.ttl: Jack Grealish told to return to Aston Villa as pundit touts move amid Manchester City struggle
arts.sum: "It’s at the stage now where Jack should probably be thinking about leaving the football club," Hendrie, who played 303 times in claret and blue, said to 10bet . Former Villa player Lee Hendrie, who knows Grealish well, has urged the England international to leave City in favour of a return to Villa Park .

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Brighton TV channel, live stream and kick off time
arts.sum: Aston Villa are looking to immediately bounce back after their 3-0 festive defeat to Newcastle United when they host Brighton and Hove Albion on Monday night. The match between Villa and Brighton is set to commence at 7:45pm on Monday, December 30.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa ‘exploring terms’ over exciting £25million winger transfer
arts.sum: Join our Aston Villa WhatsApp group and get the latest breaking news, interviews and opinion sent straight to your phone, plus matchday team news and live updates of all the action. Malen, who has five goals and one assist to his name so far this term, came through at Ajax before joining Arsenal as a 16-year-old in 2015 but a couple of years later he was sold to PSV.
